---
description: andy compound — record learnings from a completed change
argument-hint: "[topic]"
---

You are running the andy `compound` workflow.

Input: `$ARGUMENTS`

Steps:

1. Resolve the andy harness root. Use the first directory that contains both `AGENTS.md` and `core/workflows/`, in this order: `$ANDY_HARNESS_ROOT` (if set), `${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/active-harness`, `${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/harnesses/andy`, `./.andy/harness`. If none exists, tell the user to run the andy installer.
2. Read `<harness-root>/core/workflows/command-router.md` and `<harness-root>/core/workflows/compound.md`, then follow them.
3. Treat the current working directory as the target development repository. Write learnings to `./docs/compound/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>.md` in that repository.
